crime.value: Disappearance/possible murder of Makenzie Lewis, with false body identification and cover-up involving Mr. Black
crime.quote: the body that was found a week ago, appears not to be your daughter. We ran tests, and it shows that it was as 35 year old female

victim.value: Makenzie Lewis, 15-year-old cheerleader with plans for college and fitness career
victim.quote: Makenzie Lewis is 15 years old... She plans on being a professinal fitness trainer by time she is 24

culprit_and_motive.value: Someone connected to Mr. Black (Edward's father), who took cover for the actual murderer
culprit_and_motive.quote: It also appears that Mr. Black took cover for the murderer. It seems that Mr. Black does in fact know about yout daughter

investigator.value: Police officers conducting the investigation, with Mr. Brown as the primary contact
investigator.quote: Mr and Mrs. Lewis the body that was found a week ago, appears not to be your daughter

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool: Edward Black (new student with connection to disappearance), Mr. Black (takes cover for actual murderer), unnamed actual murderer. Differentiated by direct involvement vs. complicity vs. unknown identity.
suspect_architecture.quote: It also appears that Mr. Black took cover for the murderer. It seems that Mr. Black does in fact know about yout daughter.

red_herring.value: Body initially identified as Makenzie Lewis but revealed to be a 35-year-old female, misdirecting investigation timeline and victim identity.
red_herring.quote: the body that was found a week ago, appears not to be your daughter. We ran tests, and it shows that it was as 35 year old female.

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with cheerleaders, athletes, family dynamics. Police institutional authority delivering information to concerned parents.
social_world.quote: Makenzie has so much planned for her life and she's not letting anyone take that away from her. She plans on being a professinal fitness trainer

reveal_mechanic.value: Police forensic testing reveals body misidentification, but full solution mechanism not yet established in excerpt.
reveal_mechanic.quote: We ran tests, and it shows that it was as 35 year old female.

investigator_wound.value: Parents' anguish and desperation for answers about their missing daughter, with father's anger at lack of progress.
investigator_wound.quote: I want answers, and I want answers now, damnit!

_meta.title: ebook meaghan larson cheer before fear
